managed_ingress_binding_mismatch: Only the sole configured primary may manage follower ingress profiles
managed_ingress_default_delete_requires_: Set another ingress profile as default before deleting this default one
managed_ingress_default_error: The default managed ingress profile is not ready yet because it has a recorded error
managed_ingress_default_missing: Managed ingress profiles exist, but no default profile is configured
managed_ingress_default_not_applied: The default managed ingress profile has not finished applying yet
managed_ingress_required: The follower cannot accept remote writes until a default landing target is configured by the primary
managed_ingress_default_update_requires_: You cannot unset the default ingress profile directly. Set another profile as default first
managed_ingress_driver_unsupported: Managed ingress profiles only support local and S3 drivers
managed_ingress_local_path_invalid: The local ingress path must stay relative to the managed ingress root
managed_ingress_single_primary_required: Managed ingress profiles require the follower to be bound to exactly one primary. Multi-primary followers are rejected directly
